query:
INSERT INTO products (name, strain, description, category, price, retailPrice, thcPercentage, cbdPercentage, photos, quantity, unit, rating, farmerId) VALUES
-- Vapes
('Blue Dream Vape Cart', 'Blue Dream', 'Smooth and flavorful Blue Dream vape cartridge with 85% THC', 'vapes', 4500, 6000, '85', '0.5', '/products/vape-cart-1.jpg', 50, 'cartridge', '4.7', 1),
('Sour Diesel Vape', 'Sour Diesel', 'Energizing Sour Diesel vape pen with 88% THC', 'vapes', 4800, 6500, '88', '0.3', '/products/vape-cart-2.jpg', 45, 'cartridge', '4.8', 1),
('OG Kush Vape Cart', 'OG Kush', 'Classic OG Kush flavor in a premium vape cartridge', 'vapes', 4500, 6000, '86', '0.4', '/products/vape-cart-1.jpg', 60, 'cartridge', '4.6', 1),
('Gelato Vape Pen', 'Gelato', 'Sweet Gelato strain vape pen with smooth hits', 'vapes', 5000, 6500, '90', '0.2', '/products/vape-cart-2.jpg', 40, 'cartridge', '4.9', 1),

-- Edibles
('Indica Gummies 10-Pack', 'Indica Blend', 'Relaxing indica gummies, 10mg THC each', 'edibles', 2500, 3500, '10', '0', '/products/gummies-1.jpg', 100, 'pack', '4.5', 1),
('Sativa Gummies 10-Pack', 'Sativa Blend', 'Energizing sativa gummies, 10mg THC each', 'edibles', 2500, 3500, '10', '0', '/products/gummies-2.jpg', 95, 'pack', '4.6', 1),
('Hybrid Gummies 20-Pack', 'Hybrid Blend', 'Balanced hybrid gummies, 5mg THC each', 'edibles', 3000, 4000, '5', '0', '/products/gummies-1.jpg', 80, 'pack', '4.7', 1),
('CBD Gummies 10-Pack', 'CBD Blend', 'High CBD gummies for relaxation, 2mg THC / 25mg CBD each', 'edibles', 2000, 3000, '2', '25', '/products/gummies-2.jpg', 120, 'pack', '4.8', 1),

-- Concentrates
('Blue Dream Wax', 'Blue Dream', 'Premium Blue Dream wax concentrate, 92% THC', 'concentrates', 6000, 8000, '92', '0.1', '/products/concentrate-1.jpg', 30, 'gram', '4.8', 1),
('OG Kush Shatter', 'OG Kush', 'Crystal-clear OG Kush shatter, 94% THC', 'concentrates', 6500, 8500, '94', '0.1', '/products/concentrate-2.jpg', 25, 'gram', '4.9', 1),
('Gelato Live Resin', 'Gelato', 'Flavorful Gelato live resin, 88% THC', 'concentrates', 7000, 9000, '88', '0.2', '/products/concentrate-1.jpg', 20, 'gram', '4.7', 1),
('Sour Diesel Crumble', 'Sour Diesel', 'Potent Sour Diesel crumble, 90% THC', 'concentrates', 6000, 8000, '90', '0.1', '/products/concentrate-2.jpg', 35, 'gram', '4.6', 1),

-- Pre-Rolls
('Blue Dream Pre-Roll 1g', 'Blue Dream', 'Premium Blue Dream pre-roll, ready to smoke', 'pre-rolls', 1200, 1800, '24', '0.5', '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 150, 'piece', '4.6', 1),
('OG Kush Pre-Roll 1g', 'OG Kush', 'Classic OG Kush pre-roll, perfectly rolled', 'pre-rolls', 1200, 1800, '22', '0.3', '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 140, 'piece', '4.5', 1),
('Sour Diesel Pre-Roll 1g', 'Sour Diesel', 'Energizing Sour Diesel pre-roll', 'pre-rolls', 1300, 1900, '26', '0.2', '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 130, 'piece', '4.7', 1),
('Gelato Pre-Roll 1g', 'Gelato', 'Sweet Gelato strain pre-roll', 'pre-rolls', 1400, 2000, '25', '0.3', '/zappay-logo.jpeg', 120, 'piece', '4.8', 1);
